name: Fortune Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F (200°C).
2. Grease two cookie sheets.
3. Write a fortune on each strip of paper and have an empty water glass ready.
4. In a small bowl, beat butter, sugar, egg white, and vanilla extract with an electric mixer on medium speed until well blended. Stir in flour.
5. Working in batches of 3, drop about 1½ teaspoons of batter at least 4 inches (10 cm) apart on prepared cookie sheets. Spread batter with the back of a spoon into a 3-inch (7.5 cm) circle.
6. Bake for 3 to 4 minutes or until edges turn golden brown. Using a spatula, remove cookies from the sheet and place them on a work surface.
7. Place a fortune horizontally in the center of each cookie. Fold the bottom half of the cookie to the top and press the edges with your fingertips for 3 seconds.
8. Holding the top edge of the cookie, place the center over the rim of the glass. Gently press the sides down to bend the cookie in the middle. Let cool on the rim for 1 minute.
9. Repeat with remaining cookies. Let cookies cool completely on a wire rack.
10. Repeat the process using the remaining dough and cooled cookie sheets. Store in an airtight container.
